name: python3-zstd
title: python3-zstd
summary: python bindings to Yann Collet ZSTD compression library
description:
python bindings to Yann Collet ZSTD compression library
Zstandard, or zstd as short version, is a fast lossless compression algorithm,
targeting real-time compression scenarios at zlib-level and better compression
ratios.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zstd because python bindings to Yann Collet ZSTD compression library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zstd as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zstd with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zstd --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
